name: Graipussi Medussi
lore:
Lore of Graipussi Medussi
                                    


This unique character merges the qualities of grapes and Medusa, intriguing many with its unusual combination. Legend has it that this fascinating entity was discovered in the depths of the Pacific Ocean. The Grey Push Medusi stands out for its exceptional taste and milder texture compared to other jellyfish, which has made it a sought-after catch among fishermen. Unfortunately, this demand has led to a significant decline in its population.
Description original text
Italian: Graipussi Medussi! Graipussini Medussini!
English: Grai Push Medusi! Gra Ryushini Medusini!
